name: echodev-monorepo
description: EchoDev — persistent design memory for any Claude-assisted codebase

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/storage-fs packages/extractors packages/retriever packages/llm && npm run build -w @hey-echodev/cli
scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean packages/core packages/storage-fs packages/extractors packages/retriever packages/llm && rm -rf packages/cli/dist
